title: Quest 35250 Electric Twin Hob Hot Plate with Temperature Control/Set of 1000W & 1500W Hobs / 5 Temperature Settings/Portable, Ideal for Cooking While Travelling, White
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: ELECTRIC HOT PLATES - This twin set of electric hobs from Quest is ideal for cooking both at home and while traveling! Easily cook foods on the hob while camping, in a caravan, or in other places while out and about. Simply plug it in and the hobs are ready to go.

THERMOSTATICALLY CONTROLLED - There are 2 hobs, one being 1000w (small), the other 1500w (large) and each hob has 5 temperature settings to allow you to cook any food you want to easily and with control!

DURABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN - The hobs have a non-stick coating as well as overheat protection to allow you to clean up any spilled food easily. There are also non slip feet to stop any accidents either whilst cooking or cleaning.

QUALITY MATERIALS - The two hobs consist of solid die-cast heating plates, which provide even temperature distribution & better cooking results. It's easy to make a good meal even if you don't have great cooking skills!

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking & cleaning appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the home. From teppanyaki grills & waffle makers, to kettles, irons, & steam cleaners, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
Included components: 1 x twin hob hot plate
description: Product Description Previous page Portable Hob Cook food while on the go, in a caravan, campsite, or more, thanks to these hobs' portable design. Adjustable Temperature Choose between a total of 5 different temperature settings, allowing you to cook different foods. Dial-Based Controls Adjusting the settings is easy, with precise dial controls that are clearly labelled. Stable Design The non-slip feet on the base of the hobs ensures they will remain stable on any surface. Non-Stick Coating The hot plates, as well as the rest of the hobs, feature a non-stick coating to make cleaning easy. Next page 1 Portable Hob 2 Adjustable Temperature 3 Dial-Based Controls 4 Stable Design 5 Non-Stick Coating
